intent: Full-width primary CTA button for banking interfaces. Use for the single most important action on a screen. Set to fill container when placed inside a layout frame. Default width is 300px, matching a standard mobile canvas. Intended for login screens, confirmation flows, and onboarding steps.

size.description: Controls padding, border radius, and typography scale. Does not change color.

state.description: Controls background, border, and label color. Does not change size or typography.

color.description: Color tokens are state-scoped. The same token applies across all sizes within a state.

spacing.description: Spacing and radius tokens are size-scoped. Gap is shared across all sizes.

typography.description: Typography tokens are size-scoped. Family, weight, and leading are identical across sizes; only size differs.

whenToUse: Use for the single most important action on a screen.
Use on login screens, confirmation flows, and onboarding steps.
Use when the action is irreversible or high-stakes and must stand out.
Use at the bottom of a form or modal as the primary submit action.
Use Size=Large for full-bleed mobile layouts where the button fills the viewport width.
Use Size=Medium as the default for most screens.
Use Size=Small in compact contexts such as cards or inline confirmations.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for secondary or tertiary actions — there is no secondary variant in this system.
Do not use more than one Button per screen or modal view.
Do not use for navigation — use a link or a nav element instead.
Do not use for destructive actions such as delete or cancel without a separate confirmation pattern.
Do not use State=Hover or State=Active in static implementations — these are interaction states managed by the UI layer.
Do not manually set State=Disabled without also making the button non-interactive in code.
constraints: Width is full-width (fill container). Do not set a fixed width other than the 300px default unless inside a layout frame.
Label text is always center-aligned and single-line. Do not wrap the label.
All color values must resolve through the token chain — never hardcode hex values.
Typography is always Inter SemiBold (weight 600). Do not override font family or weight.
There is only one variant axis for color (state) and one for size. No other visual properties are exposed.
The token alias chain must remain unbroken: component tokens alias semantic tokens, semantic tokens alias primitives.

alternatives.situation: Secondary or ghost action needed alongside this button
alternatives.recommendation: No secondary button exists in this system yet. Add a new component to the index before implementing.
No link or text-action component exists in this system yet. Do not repurpose Button for this.
No icon button exists in this system yet. Do not use Button with an empty label.
